slow_internet.solution: Try restarting your router and checking your connection settings.

app_crashing.symptom: The app keeps crashing on startup.
app_crashing.solution: Update the app to the latest version and restart your device.

forgot_password.solution: Use the password reset option or contact support if you cannot access your account.

wifi_not_connecting.symptom: My device won't connect to Wi-Fi.
wifi_not_connecting.solution: Restart your router, make sure Wi-Fi is enabled, and reconnect to the network.

computer_running_slow.symptom: My computer is running very slowly.
computer_running_slow.solution: Close unnecessary programs, restart your computer, and check for software updates.

printer_not_working.solution: Check that the printer is powered on, connected correctly, and has enough paper and ink.

battery_draining.symptom: My laptop battery drains too quickly.
battery_draining.solution: Reduce screen brightness, close unused applications, and enable battery saver mode.

bluetooth_not_working.symptom: Bluetooth is not connecting to my device.
bluetooth_not_working.solution: Turn Bluetooth off and on again, make sure the device is discoverable, and restart both devices.

no_sound.symptom: I can't hear any sound from my computer.
no_sound.solution: Check the volume level, verify the correct audio output is selected, and restart the application.

storage_full.symptom: My device says the storage is full.
storage_full.solution: Delete unnecessary files, empty the recycle bin, or move files to cloud storage or an external drive.
